content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>集成该sdk的进程受到致命信号抓取coredump,coredump包含了哪些方面的内容,跟aosp原生的coredump生成过程对比,有哪些区别,多了哪些内容</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T08:46:11.764Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/.claude/skills/init-explore/scripts/generate-deep-knowledge.py\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/home/cwtrocks/.claude/skills/init-explore/scripts/generate-deep-knowledge.py\",\"content\":\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n深度知识生成器\\n从 tree-sitter + SCIP + Semgrep 分析结果生成精细知识文档\\n\\n输出:\\n- 符号索引文档\\n- 函数关系图\\n- 代码模式文档\\n- 复杂度分析\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport os\\nimport json\\nimport glob\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom datetime import datetime\\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Any\\n\\nPROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent\\nANALYSIS_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / \\\".understand-anything\\\" / \\\"deep-analysis\\\"\\nDOCS_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / \\\"docs\\\" / \\\"exploration\\\"\\n\\ndef load_analysis_data() -> Dict[str, Any]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"加载所有分析数据\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    data = {}\\n\\n    # AST 分析\\n    ast_file = ANALYSIS_DIR / \\\"ast-analysis.json\\\"\\n    if ast_file.exists():\\n        with open(ast_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\\n            data['ast'] = json.load(f)\\n\\n    # SCIP 索引\\n    scip_files = list(ANALYSIS_DIR.glob(\\\"*.scip\\\"))\\n    if scip_files:\\n        data['scip'] = scip_files[0].name\\n\\n    # Semgrep 结果\\n    semgrep_file = ANALYSIS_DIR / \\\"semgrep-results.json\\\"\\n    if semgrep_file.exists():\\n        try:\\n            with open(semgrep_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\\n                data['semgrep'] = json.load(f)\\n        except:\\n            data['semgrep'] = None\\n\\n    return data\\n\\ndef generate_symbol_index(data: Dict) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成符号索引文档\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    content = []\\n    content.append(\\\"# 符号索引 (Symbol Index)\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"> 自动生成于 \\\" + datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"## 概述\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    ast_data = data.get('ast', {})\\n    files = ast_data.get('files', [])\\n    summary = ast_data.get('summary', {})\\n\\n    content.append(f\\\"- **分析文件数**: {summary.get('total_files', len(files))}\\\")\\n    content.append(f\\\"- **总函数数**: {summary.get('total_functions', 0)}\\\")\\n    content.append(f\\\"- **SCIP 索引**: {data.get('scip', 'N/A')}\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"## 文件符号表\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"| 文件 | 语言 | 函数数 | 符号数 |\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"|------|------|--------|--------|\\\")\\n\\n    for f in files[:20]:  # 限制 20 个\\n        path = f.get('path', 'N/A')\\n        lang = f.get('language', 'N/A')\\n        funcs = f.get('functions', 0)\\n        symbols = f.get('symbols', 0)\\n        content.append(f\\\"| `{path}` | {lang} | {funcs} | {symbols} |\\\")\\n\\n    if len(files) > 20:\\n        content.append(f\\\"| ... | ... | ... | ... |\\\")\\n        content.append(f\\\"| **共 {len(files)} 个文件** | | |\\\")\\n\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(content)\\n\\ndef generate_function_relationship(data: Dict) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成函数关系文档\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    content = []\\n    content.append(\\\"# 函数关系图 (Function Relationships)\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"> 自动生成于 \\\" + datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"## 函数调用关系\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```mermaid\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"graph TD\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    subgraph Core\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Opencore[Opencore::GetInstance]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Enable[Opencore::Enable]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Handle[Opencore::HandleSignal]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Dump[Opencore::Dump]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    end\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    subgraph Architecture\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Arm64[arm64::Opencore]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        Arm[arm::Opencore]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        X86[x86::Opencore]\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    end\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Enable --> Handle\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Handle --> Dump\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Dump --> Arm64\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Dump --> Arm\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Dump --> X86\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 添加已知函数\\n    ast_data = data.get('ast', {})\\n    files = ast_data.get('files', [])\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"## 核心函数列表\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"| 类/模块 | 函数 | 用途 |\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"|---------|------|------|\\\")\\n\\n    core_functions = [\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"GetInstance()\\\", \\\"获取单例实例\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"Enable()\\\", \\\"安装信号处理器\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"Disable()\\\", \\\"卸载信号处理器\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"HandleSignal()\\\", \\\"信号处理入口\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"Dump()\\\", \\\"触发 core dump\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"Coredump()\\\", \\\"执行 fork 进行 dump\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"StopTheWorld()\\\", \\\"暂停所有线程\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"Continue()\\\", \\\"恢复所有线程\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"ParseMaps()\\\", \\\"解析进程内存映射\\\"),\\n        (\\\"Opencore\\\", \\\"IsFilterSegment()\\\", \\\"判断 VMA 是否过滤\\\"),\\n    ]\\n\\n    for cls, func, desc in core_functions:\\n        content.append(f\\\"| {cls} | `{func}` | {desc} |\\\")\\n\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(content)\\n\\ndef generate_code_patterns(data: Dict) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成代码模式文档\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    content = []\\n    content.append(\\\"# 代码模式 (Code Patterns)\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"> 自动生成于 \\\" + datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"## 设计模式\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    patterns = [\\n        (\\\"单例模式\\\", \\\"Opencore::GetInstance()\\\", \\\"确保全局只有一个 Opencore 实例\\\"),\\n        (\\\"模板方法\\\", \\\"各架构 ::Opencore\\\", \\\"基类定义算法骨架，子类实现细节\\\"),\\n        (\\\"策略模式\\\", \\\"IsFilterSegment()\\\", \\\"不同的 VMA 过滤策略\\\"),\\n        (\\\"工厂模式\\\", \\\"各架构构造函数\\\", \\\"根据编译目标创建对应架构的实现\\\"),\\n    ]\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"| 模式 | 应用位置 | 描述 |\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"|------|----------|------|\\\")\\n    for pattern, location, desc in patterns:\\n        content.append(f\\\"| {pattern} | `{location}` | {desc} |\\\")\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"## 关键实现模式\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"### 1. 信号处理流程\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```cpp\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"void Opencore::HandleSignal(int signal, siginfo_t* siginfo, void* ucontext_raw) {\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    pthread_mutex_lock(&g_handle_lock);  // 互斥保护\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Disable();                           // 卸载处理器\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    Dump(siginfo, ucontext_raw);        // 生成 core\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    raise(signal);                      // 恢复原处理\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    pthread_mutex_unlock(&g_handle_lock);\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"}\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"### 2. Fork Dump 模式\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```cpp\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"bool Opencore::Coredump(const char* filename) {\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    pid_t child = fork();  // 创建子进程\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    if (child == 0) {\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        IgnoreHandler();         // 子进程忽略信号\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        signal(SIGALRM, TimeoutHandle);\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        alarm(getTimeout());     // 超时保护\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        DoCoredump(filename);    // 执行 dump\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        _exit(0);\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    } else {\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"        wait(&status);           // 父进程等待\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"    }\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"}\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"```\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # Semgrep 发现\\n    semgrep_data = data.get('semgrep')\\n    if semgrep_data and semgrep_data.get('results'):\\n        content.append(\\\"## 代码问题发现\\\")\\n        content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        content.append(\\\"| 规则 | 文件 | 行号 |\\\")\\n        content.append(\\\"|------|------|------|\\\")\\n        for result in semgrep_data['results'][:10]:\\n            rule = result.get('check', 'N/A')\\n            path = result.get('path', 'N/A')\\n            start = result.get('start', {}).get('line', '?')\\n            content.append(f\\\"| {rule} | `{path}` | {start} |\\\")\\n\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(content)\\n\\ndef generate_complexity_analysis(data: Dict) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成复杂度分析文档\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    content = []\\n    content.append(\\\"# 复杂度分析 (Complexity Analysis)\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"> 自动生成于 \\\" + datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    ast_data = data.get('ast', {})\\n    files = ast_data.get('files', [])\\n\\n    # 统计函数最多的文件\\n    files_with_funcs = [(f['path'], f['functions'], f['language']) for f in files]\\n    files_with_funcs.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"## 函数分布\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"| 文件 | 函数数 | 语言 |\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"|------|--------|------|\\\")\\n    for path, funcs, lang in files_with_funcs[:15]:\\n        content.append(f\\\"| `{path}` | {funcs} | {lang} |\\\")\\n\\n    # 语言统计\\n    lang_stats = {}\\n    for f in files:\\n        lang = f.get('language', 'unknown')\\n        lang_stats[lang] = lang_stats.get(lang, 0) + 1\\n\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"## 语言分布\\\")\\n    content.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    for lang, count in sorted(lang_stats.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True):\\n        content.append(f\\\"- **{lang}**: {count} 文件\\\")\\n\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(content)\\n\\ndef main():\\n    print(\\\"=== 深度知识生成 ===\\\")\\n\\n    # 加载分析数据\\n    data = load_analysis_data()\\n\\n    if not data:\\n        print(\\\"⚠️  无分析数据，请先运行 deep-code-analysis.sh\\\")\\n        return\\n\\n    # 生成各类型文档\\n    docs = [\\n        (\\\"14-symbol-index.md\\\", generate_symbol_index, \\\"符号索引\\\"),\\n        (\\\"15-function-relationships.md\\\", generate_function_relationship, \\\"函数关系\\\"),\\n        (\\\"16-code-patterns.md\\\", generate_code_patterns, \\\"代码模式\\\"),\\n        (\\\"17-complexity-analysis.md\\\", generate_complexity_analysis, \\\"复杂度分析\\\"),\\n    ]\\n\\n    for filename, generator, title in docs:\\n        filepath = DOCS_DIR / filename\\n        content = generator(data)\\n        filepath.write_text(content, encoding='utf-8')\\n        print(f\\\"✅ 生成: {filename} ({title})\\\")\\n\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n共生成 {len(docs)} 个深度知识文档\\\")\\n\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\n    main()\",\"numLines\":279,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":279}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/home/cwtrocks/.claude/skills/init-explore/scripts/auto-capture-skill.sh\",\"content\":\"#!/bin/bash\\n# 自动知识质量评估\\n# 用法: bash scripts/auto-evaluate.sh \\\"对话内容\\\" \\\"分析的文件1,文件2,文件3\\\"\\n\\nCONVERSATION=\\\"$1\\\"\\nANALYZED_FILES=\\\"$2\\\"\\nPROJECT_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"$0\\\")/..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\n# 质量阈值\\nTHRESHOLD=4\\nSCORE=0\\n\\necho \\\"=== 自动知识质量评估 ===\\\"\\necho \\\"\\\"\\n\\n# 1. 深度分析加分（3+ 文件）\\nif [ -n \\\"$ANALYZED_FILES\\\" ]; then\\n    FILE_COUNT=$(echo \\\"$ANALYZED_FILES\\\" | tr ',' '\\\\n' | wc -l)\\n    if [ \\\"$FILE_COUNT\\\" -ge 3 ]; then\\n        SCORE=$((SCORE + 3))\\n        echo \\\"✅ 深度分析: +3 (分析了 $FILE_COUNT 个文件)\\\"\\n    fi\\nfi\\n\\n# 2. 架构讨论加分\\nif echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -qE \\\"架构|分层|设计模式|architecture|layer|pattern\\\"; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 架构讨论: +2\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 3. 图表加分\\nDIAGRAM_COUNT=$(echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -c \\\"```mermaid\\\" || echo \\\"0\\\")\\nif [ \\\"$DIAGRAM_COUNT\\\" -ge 1 ]; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 流程图: +$((DIAGRAM_COUNT * 2)) (包含 $DIAGRAM_COUNT 个图表)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 4. 集成指南加分\\nif echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -qE \\\"集成|接入|Maven|Gradle|CMake|integration\\\"; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 集成指南: +2\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 5. 复杂流程加分\\nif echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -qE \\\"流程|时序|步骤|处理流程\\\"; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 1))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 技术流程: +1\\\"\\nfi\\n\\necho \\\"\\\"\\necho \\\"质量评分: $SCORE / $THRESHOLD\\\"\\n\\n# 更新状态\\nif [ \\\"$SCORE\\\" -ge \\\"$THRESHOLD\\\" ]; then\\n    echo \\\"\\\"\\n    echo \\\"✅ 达到自动捕获阈值\\\"\\n\\n    # 更新时间戳\\n    mkdir -p \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.understand-anything\\\"\\n    date +%s > \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.understand-anything/last-explore.txt\\\"\\n\\n    # 更新知识系统状态\\n    if [ -f \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.knowledge-system.json\\\" ]; then\\n        python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nfrom datetime import datetime\\nwith open('$PROJECT_ROOT/.knowledge-system.json', 'r+') as f:\\n    d = json.load(f)\\n    d['lastUpdate'] = datetime.now().isoformat()\\n    d['lastUpdateBy'] = 'auto-capture'\\n    d['autoCapturedCount'] = d.get('autoCapturedCount', 0) + 1\\n    f.seek(0)\\n    json.dump(d, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\\n    f.truncate()\\n\\\"\\n    fi\\n\\n    echo \\\"✅ 知识系统状态已更新\\\"\\n    exit 0\\nelse\\n    echo \\\"⚪ 未达到捕获阈值\\\"\\n    exit 1\\nfi\",\"numLines\":83,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":83}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 架构讨论: +2\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 3. 图表加分\\nDIAGRAM_COUNT=$(echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -c \\\"```mermaid\\\" || echo \\\"0\\\")\\nif [ \\\"$DIAGRAM_COUNT\\\" -ge 1 ]; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 流程图: +$((DIAGRAM_COUNT * 2)) (包含 $DIAGRAM_COUNT 个图表)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 4. 集成指南加分\\nif echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -qE \\\"集成|接入|Maven|Gradle|CMake|integration\\\"; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 2))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 集成指南: +2\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# 5. 复杂流程加分\\nif echo \\\"$CONVERSATION\\\" | grep -qE \\\"流程|时序|步骤|处理流程\\\"; then\\n    SCORE=$((SCORE + 1))\\n    echo \\\"✅ 技术流程: +1\\\"\\nfi\\n\\necho \\\"\\\"\\necho \\\"质量评分: $SCORE / $THRESHOLD\\\"\\n\\n# 更新状态\\nif [ \\\"$SCORE\\\" -ge \\\"$THRESHOLD\\\" ]; then\\n    echo \\\"\\\"\\n    echo \\\"✅ 达到自动捕获阈值\\\"\\n\\n    # 更新时间戳\\n    mkdir -p \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.understand-anything\\\"\\n    date +%s > \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.understand-anything/last-explore.txt\\\"\\n\\n    # 更新知识系统状态\\n    if [ -f \\\"$PROJECT_ROOT/.knowledge-system.json\\\" ]; then\\n        python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nfrom datetime import datetime\\nwith open('$PROJECT_ROOT/.knowledge-system.json', 'r+') as f:\\n    d = json.load(f)\\n    d['lastUpdate'] = datetime.now().isoformat()\\n    d['lastUpdateBy'] = 'auto-capture'\\n    d['autoCapturedCount'] = d.get('autoCapturedCount', 0) + 1\\n    f.seek(0)\\n    json.dump(d, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\\n    f.truncate()\\n\\\"\\n    fi\\n\\n    echo \\\"✅ 知识系统状态已更新\\\"\\n    exit 0\\nelse\\n    echo \\\"⚪ 未达到捕获阈值\\\"\\n    exit 1\\nfi\",\"numLines\":83,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":83}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>
